sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel movement not applicable

special_mechanics.name: Tetromino Placement
special_mechanics.description: Puzzle game mechanic similar to Dr. Mario but using tetrominoes instead of pills. Player places falling pieces to clear lines.

special_mechanics.name: Versus Mode
special_mechanics.description: 1P vs. COM and 1P vs. 2P competitive modes available

tier_notes: Tier 3 game - puzzle genre. No traditional character physics, jumping, or movement parameters. Documentation focuses on game modes, debug features, and regional differences rather than physics systems. Piece-dropping mechanics not quantified in available sources.
sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - Tetris 2 SNES article)
